TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 CADILLAC SRX. WHILE DRIVING 45 MPH, THE SUN ROOF SHATTERED. THERE WERE NO INJURIES. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO DE LA FUENTE CADILLAC (1385 E MAIN ST, EL CAJON, CA 92021, (619) 333-8167) WHERE IT WAS DETERMINED THAT THE SUN ROOF SHATTERED FROM THE INSIDE,

CAR WAS MAKING WHISTLING/HOWLING SOUND BETWEEN 30MPH-45MPH. THOUGHT POSSIBLY A BREAKING IN ISSUE, BUT CONTINUED AFTER 1200 MILES AND WAS MOST PREVALENT AT STATED MPH ABOVE. SHOP STATED BEARING ISSUE IN DRIVE SHAFT AND ENTIRE DRIVE SHAFT MUST BE REPLACED. CONCERN OVER EFFECT TO OT

narrative.headline: What 2015 Cadillac Srx owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 441 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Exterior Lighting (68% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
